title: Advanced Sorting of Subitems
excerpt:

posts.author: amiraenergyedc (Amira R)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to layer on sorts of my subitems! So I can sort by more than one column

Sometimes we have items with hundreds of subitems, would love to be able to sort by priority AND person connected to it/title of the subitem.

Help please!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Amira,
I’ve checked that there is a possibility to sort subitems by a few columns. Have this functionality been added or you mean some another case? Could you please elaborate on that?
